@github Review the entire pull request. Identify:
- Bugs or logical errors
- Security vulnerabilities
- Performance issues
- Code smells or anti‑patterns
- Missing null/edge‑case handling
- Violations of clean code or SOLID principles
- Poor naming or unclear logic
- Redundant or duplicated code
- Missing unit tests or test coverage gaps

Provide:
1. A concise summary of the PR
2. File-by-file review
3. Specific line references
4. Recommended fixes with improved code snippets
5. A final decision: Approve / Request Changes / General Comments
